title: Remove "Deleted Member" icons from Quick Filter/Person list.
excerpt: When someone is using the phone app and they’re filtering for items allocated to a certain user, their screen is filled with “Deleted Members” icons in the Quick Filters/Person list.

posts.author: Des_Symmetry (Des McArthur)
posts.cookedHtml:
When someone is using the phone app and they’re filtering for items allocated to a certain user, their screen is filled with “Deleted Members” icons in the Quick Filters/Person list.
